name: Minimal Wide
description: Clean, typographic slide with a large heading and body text — 16:9 widescreen
author: slide-cli

slots.label: Label / tag
slots.description: Small label shown above the heading

slots.label: Image
slots.description: Optional image. File path (relative to data JSON) or https:// URL. In wide layout: placed right of text (default) or full-bleed.

slots.label: Image position
slots.description: Where to place the image: 'right' (beside text, half-width), 'top' (above text, full-width strip), or 'bottom' (below text). Default: right.

slots.label: Accent color
slots.description: Color for the label and decorative line
